inputs.label: Calibration Interval (days)
inputs.businessContext: Standard calibration frequency per ISO 17025 or manufacturer recommendation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard calibration frequency per ISO 17025 or manufacturer recommendation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ISO 17025 veya üretici tavsiyesine göre standart kalibrasyon sıklığı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Fréquence d'étalonnage standard selon ISO 17025 ou recommandation du fabricant.
businessContext_i18n.es: Frecuencia de calibración estándar según ISO 17025 o recomendación del fabricante.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تردد المعايرة القياسي وفقًا لـ ISO 17025 أو توصية الشركة المصنعة.

inputs.label: Days Since Last Calibration
inputs.businessContext: Actual elapsed time since the most recent calibration event.

label_i18n.tr: Son Kalibrasyondan Bu Yana Geçen Gün

businessContext_i18n.en: Actual elapsed time since the most recent calibration event.
businessContext_i18n.tr: En son kalibrasyon olayından bu yana geçen fiili süre.
businessContext_i18n.de: Tatsächliche vergangene Zeit seit dem letzten Kalibrierungsereignis.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps écoulé réel depuis le dernier événement d'étalonnage.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo real transcurrido desde el evento de calibración más reciente.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الوقت الفعلي المنقضي منذ آخر حدث معايرة.

inputs.label: Measurement Tolerance (%)
inputs.businessContext: Maximum allowable deviation from nominal value, typically defined by process specs or Six Sigma limits.

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum allowable deviation from nominal value, typically defined by process specs or Six Sigma limits.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nominal değerden izin verilen maksimum sapma, genellikle proses spesifikasyonları veya Altı Sigma limitleri ile tanımlanır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximal zulässige Abweichung vom Nennwert, typischerweise definiert durch Prozessspezifikationen oder Six Sigma-Grenzen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Écart maximal autorisé par rapport à la valeur nominale, généralement défini par les spécifications du procédé ou les limites Six Sigma.
businessContext_i18n.es: Desviación máxima permitida del valor nominal, típicamente definida por especificaciones de proceso o límites de Seis Sigma.
businessContext_i18n.ar: أقصى انحراف مسموح به عن القيمة الاسمية، يُحدد عادةً حسب مواصفات العملية أو حدود سيجما الستة.

inputs.label: Observed Drift (%)
inputs.businessContext: Measured deviation from nominal at last verification, expressed as percentage of full scale.

businessContext_i18n.en: Measured deviation from nominal at last verification, expressed as percentage of full scale.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Son doğrulamada nominal değerden ölçülen sapma, tam skalaya göre yüzde olarak ifade edilir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gemessene Abweichung vom Nennwert bei der letzten Überprüfung, ausgedrückt als Prozentsatz des Vollausschlags.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Écart mesuré par rapport à la valeur nominale lors de la dernière vérification, exprimé en pourcentage de la pleine échelle.
businessContext_i18n.es: Desviación medida del valor nominal en la última verificación, expresada como porcentaje de la escala completa.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الانحراف المقاس عن القيمة الاسمية في آخر تحقق، معبرًا عنه كنسبة مئوية من المقياس الكامل.

inputs.label: Environmental Stress Factor
inputs.businessContext: Qualitative assessment of temperature, humidity, vibration, and contamination effects on drift rate.

businessContext_i18n.en: Qualitative assessment of temperature, humidity, vibration, and contamination effects on drift rate.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sıcaklık, nem, titreşim ve kirlenmenin sürüklenme hızı üzerindeki etkilerinin nitel değerlendirmesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Qualitative Bewertung der Auswirkungen von Temperatur, Feuchtigkeit, Vibration und Kontamination auf die Driftrate.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Évaluation qualitative des effets de la température, de l'humidité, des vibrations et de la contamination sur le taux de dérive.
businessContext_i18n.es: Evaluación cualitativa de los efectos de temperatura, humedad, vibración y contaminación en la tasa de deriva.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تقييم نوعي لتأثيرات درجة الحرارة والرطوبة والاهتزاز والتلوث على معدل الانحراف.

inputs.label: Criticality Level
inputs.businessContext: Impact of measurement error on product quality, safety, or regulatory compliance (per ISO 9001 risk-based thinking).

businessContext_i18n.en: Impact of measurement error on product quality, safety, or regulatory compliance (per ISO 9001 risk-based thinking).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ölçüm hatasının ürün kalitesi, güvenlik veya mevzuat uyumluluğu üzerindeki etkisi (ISO 9001 risk temelli düşünceye göre).
businessContext_i18n.de: Auswirkung des Messfehlers auf Produktqualität, Sicherheit oder regulatorische Compliance (gemäß ISO 9001 risikobasiertem Denken).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Impact de l'erreur de mesure sur la qualité du produit, la sécurité ou la conformité réglementaire (selon la pensée basée sur les risques de l'ISO 9001).
businessContext_i18n.es: Impacto del error de medición en la calidad del producto, seguridad o cumplimiento normativo (según el pensamiento basado en riesgos de ISO 9001).
businessContext_i18n.ar: تأثير خطأ القياس على جودة المنتج أو السلامة أو الامتثال التنظيمي (وفقًا للتفكير القائم على المخاطر في ISO 9001).

inputs.label: Historical Failure Rate (per 100 calibrations)
inputs.businessContext: Number of times the instrument exceeded tolerance in the last 100 calibration events, used for reliability trending.

label_i18n.es: Tasa histórica de fallos (por cada 100 calibraciones)

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of times the instrument exceeded tolerance in the last 100 calibration events, used for reliability trending.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Son 100 kalibrasyon olayında cihazın toleransı aştığı sayı, güvenilirlik trendi için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Male, die das Instrument in den letzten 100 Kalibrierungsereignissen die Toleranz überschritten hat, verwendet für Zuverlässigkeitstrends.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de fois où l'instrument a dépassé la tolérance lors des 100 derniers étalonnages, utilisé pour l'analyse de tendance de fiabilité.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de veces que el instrumento superó la tolerancia en los últimos 100 eventos de calibración, utilizado para la tendencia de confiabilidad.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد المرات التي تجاوز فيها الجهاز التفاوت المسموح به في آخر 100 حدث معايرة، يُستخدم لتحليل اتجاهات الموثوقية.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Score (0-100)
inputs.businessContext: Subjective or calculated measure of data quality based on measurement system analysis (MSA) per AIAG MSA manual.

businessContext_i18n.en: Subjective or calculated measure of data quality based on measurement system analysis (MSA) per AIAG MSA manual.
businessContext_i18n.tr: AIAG MSA kılavuzuna göre ölçüm sistemi analizine (MSA) dayalı, öznel veya hesaplanmış veri kalitesi ölçüsü.
businessContext_i18n.de: Subjektives oder berechnetes Maß der Datenqualität basierend auf der Messsystemanalyse (MSA) gemäß AIAG MSA-Handbuch.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Mesure subjective ou calculée de la qualité des données basée sur l'analyse du système de mesure (MSA) selon le manuel MSA de l'AIAG.
businessContext_i18n.es: Medida subjetiva o calculada de la calidad de los datos basada en el análisis del sistema de medición (MSA) según el manual MSA de AIAG.
businessContext_i18n.ar: مقياس شخصي أو محسوب لجودة البيانات بناءً على تحليل نظام القياس (MSA) وفقًا لدليل AIAG MSA.

rules.message: Days since last calibration exceed the calibration interval. Immediate recalibration recommended.
Observed drift exceeds measurement tolerance. Instrument is out of specification.
Extreme environment combined with critical application: consider redundant measurement or real-time monitoring.

thresholds.message: Drift risk is low. Continue routine calibration schedule.
Drift risk is moderate. Consider shortening calibration interval or increasing verification frequency.
Drift risk is high. Immediate recalibration and root cause investigation required.
Drift risk is critical. Instrument must be taken out of service and recalibrated before further use.

hiddenLossDrivers: Model uses normalized input chain — validate units
